description_long: This object consists of three stacked, rectangular toolboxes with a rugged, industrial design. The toolboxes are primarily constructed from dark gray metal, featuring reinforced edges and corners, and display visible signs of rust and weathering, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. Each box has a ribbed, metallic front panel with a red accent and a white symbol or marking, possibly for identification or warning. The lids are flat with recessed areas and circular, metallic latches, and the sides show additional paneling and subtle geometric indentations. The overall form is utilitarian, with no visible wheels or handles, and the boxes are arranged in a staggered stack. The design and wear indicate these toolboxes are suitable for urban or industrial settings, such as garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A set of three rugged, weathered metal toolboxes stacked together, featuring ribbed red-and-gray panels and prominent latches. The boxes show signs of heavy use and are designed for industrial or urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed metallic panels with red accents and white markings on all three toolboxes, highlighting their stacked arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the staggered stacking and the reinforced, rusted corners and edges of the toolboxes.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with a clear look at the ribbed panels and the arrangement of the boxes, showing the side of one box with a red panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the solid, reinforced sides and the geometric paneling, with less emphasis on the ribbed fronts.
attribute_handle_type: No visible external handles; likely integrated or recessed metal handles not visible from these views.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Rotary metal latches on the lid, robust and industrial, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments or trays are visible; the boxes appear to be single large compartments with hinged lids.
attribute_external_labeling: white symbol or marking on the front ribbed panel of each box
